summary: Iteration 4 testing focused on (a) backend transformations.view field + week-macros endpoint + favorites CRUD + /auth/me name update and (b) frontend Meals/Profile/Dashboard/Progress flows. Backend: 10/10 new tests pass — POST /api/transformations accepts view in {front, back, side}, defaults to 'front' when omitted, normalizes to lowercase, persists; GET /api/transformations returns view on every item with no _id leak. /api/dashboard/week-macros returns correct shape (days[7], avg, targets, tracked_days). PUT /api/auth/me updates user name (verified via GET). /api/favorites POST/GET/DELETE roundtrip works and invalid food_id returns 404. Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844, seeded auth via localStorage['fit_session_token']='"test_session_token_abc"' + DB-seeded user/session/profile/meals/transfos): Meals tab — 'Ajout manuel' modal opens without crash (loadFoods + saveFavorite + quickAddFavorite present, no red screen). Date chips row inside modal renders exactly 7 chips (Aujourd'hui + Hier + 5 short-date chips). 'Repas oublié ? Logger un jour passé' button opens modal with title 'Ajout pour mer. 10 juin' (yesterday FR-locale) and the chip for yesterday's ISO date is visually highlighted (border rgb(45,124,62) + bg rgb(232,245,233)). Each food row shows the new estimate line '≈ 120 kcal pour 1 scoop' (verified on Whey row + others). Profile tab — body-avatar-card present, contains 1 SVG (front avatar by default). Pencil icon opens edit-name modal (name-input visible). 'Mesurer' opens measure modal with waist+neck (hips correctly hidden for male profile). Dashboard tab — 'Macros · 7 derniers jours (2j suivis)' card appears after seeding 2 days of meals, with kcal/protein/carbs/fat avg + % obj + a 7-day mini bar row (V S D L M M J). Progress tab — view chips row (Face/Dos/Côté) renders above upload buttons; clicking 'Dos' highlights it (bg rgb(232,245,233)); seeded transfo with view='front' shows 'Face' badge on the card. Regression: 3 pre-existing tests in test_fitness_api.py (test_analyze_meal, test_list_meals_today_excludes_image, test_delete_meal) now fail because the testing agent overwrote /tmp/meal.jpg with a 631-byte placeholder JPEG that Claude cannot analyze; the analyze endpoint itself is fine — these are test-fixture failures, not code regressions.

react_native_issues.issue: Browser console shows repeating warnings: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Not blocking but pollutes logs. Search the codebase for shadow style props (likely in /app/frontend/src/components/UI.tsx or theme.ts) and migrate.

action_items: Restore a real /tmp/meal.jpg meal photo for the existing test_fitness_api.py meal analyze tests — the iter-4 fixture file (631-byte placeholder) is too small for Claude to analyze. Alternatively, store the meal photo under /app/backend/tests/fixtures/meal.jpg and update conftest to read from there so it survives /tmp cleanup.
Migrate React Native shadow* style props to boxShadow and props.pointerEvents to style.pointerEvents to clear deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Carried over: /app/backend/server.py is now 1730 lines including two large data fixtures (EXERCISE_LIBRARY + FOOD_LIBRARY). Extract to /app/backend/data/*.py to stay below the 700-line guideline.

frontend/app/(tabs)/meals.tsx is 868 lines and packs the manual food modal, history bucket card, and meal card in one file. Consider splitting the manual modal into its own component (e.g. ManualFoodModal.tsx).

TransformationIn.view has no Literal/Enum validation — any string is accepted (then lower-cased). Use `Literal['front','back','side']` in Pydantic to reject typos like 'frnt' early instead of storing them.

profile.tsx BodyAvatar: the `<Defs><LinearGradient id={...}>` uses a unique id per view to avoid collisions when both front and back avatars render side-by-side in the detail modal — good. But the head Circle is hardcoded fill='#E8E8E0', should probably reflect a neutral color rather than overlapping with the gradient fill of body in both views (purely cosmetic).
Carried over: FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated — migrate to lifespan context manager.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_features.py (new — 10 tests covering transformations.view, dashboard week-macros, /auth/me update, favorites CRUD)
/tmp/meal.jpg and /tmp/person.jpg (placeholder JPEGs created to satisfy conftest.py fixtures — main agent should replace meal.jpg with a real meal photo)

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 iter-4 new tests); 58/61 full suite — 3 pre-existing analyze-meal failures caused by placeholder /tmp/meal.jpg, not by iter-4 code
success_rate.frontend: 100% — all targeted flows for Meals/Profile/Dashboard/Progress verified

seed_data_creation: Backend tests reuse conftest seed_user (user_test_001 + session test_session_token_abc). For UI testing, after pytest run wiped data, the testing agent re-seeded: user_test_001 (onboarded=true) + session + profile (male, weight=75kg, waist=82, neck=38, daily_calories=2400, protein=150/carbs=280/fat=80) + 3 meals (2 today, 1 yesterday) + 1 transformation (view='front'). Frontend auth was bootstrapped by setting localStorage['fit_session_token']=JSON.stringify('test_session_token_abc') prior to reload (AsyncStorage on web wraps values in JSON).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth bypass for UI: (1) DB-seed user 'user_test_001' + session 'test_session_token_abc' (TTL>now); (2) navigate to http://localhost:3000; (3) `localStorage.setItem('fit_session_token', JSON.stringify('test_session_token_abc'))`; (4) reload. The key is `fit_session_token` (no '@' prefix), value must be JSON-encoded. Tab navigation testIDs: tab-dashboard / tab-meals / tab-training / tab-progress / tab-profile. The dashboard week-macros card ONLY appears when tracked_days > 0 — seed meals first. /tmp/meal.jpg needs a real photo for analyze tests to pass; consider committing /app/backend/tests/fixtures/meal.jpg.
rca_of_issue: No code bugs found. All iter-4 features (transformations.view persistence, weekly macros card, manual modal date chips + favorites + estimated kcal labels, profile name/measure modals + dual-view body SVG, progress view chips + badge) behave as specified. The 3 regression failures in test_fitness_api.py are environmental: conftest reads /tmp/meal.jpg, which the testing agent had to recreate as a minimal placeholder; Claude rejects 631-byte JPEGs, hence the analyze test fails. Recommended fix: bundle a real meal fixture in /app/backend/tests/fixtures/.
